_comment: Project-scoped hooks — session traces (deep telemetry) from the first session on a fresh clone. trace-log.ts is fail-open (can never block a turn), records no tool outputs or file contents, and writes only to gitignored meta/telemetry/traces/*.local.jsonl — nothing leaves the machine. Aggregate with `bun run trace-report`. Design: brain/decision-log/2026-07-19-code-as-harness-session-traces.md
